business_name: Sandy Springs Plumbing, Heating, and Air Conditioning
prompt: Seasoned male plumber-HVAC technician with gray hair, wearing navy work shirt, examining a residential water heater in a clean basement utility room. Copper supply lines visible overhead, gas line shut-off valve in frame. Reading a pressure gauge with focused expression. Warm side lighting from a small utility room window. Classic, traditional photojournalistic style conveying decades of experience. Deep navy color grading with warm copper accents. No vehicles. No branded signage. No visible face if possible — focus on the hands, the tool, and the copper pipe. Aspect 16:9 landscape cinematic composition.
acceptance_criteria: Subject appears to be an experienced tradesman (65+) not a young technician
Active work posture — examining, measuring, or testing
Water heater, copper piping, or gas valve visibly in frame
Interior residential utility room or basement setting
Deep navy clothing dominates the tradesman
No faces if possible; if visible, neutral/focused, not smiling for camera
No text, no logos, no branded signage
No vehicle, no truck, no exterior
Suitable for hero overlay with dark gradient top-right to bottom-left for headline

layer_1_places_api.reason: GBP photos only visible as low-res screenshot thumbnails; hero needs higher-res

layer_2_firecrawl.reason: Attempt Firecrawl pull on GBP listing for real hero + 6 gallery photos before falling back to Recraft

layer_3_recraft.reason: If Firecrawl fails, generate hero per prompt above
